summary: Implemented MetricsAggregator in src/metrics/aggregator.ts with: computePacketLoss() (failed-probe ratio from statusCode 0 or non-finite RTT), estimateBandwidth() (mean throughput in Mbps from resource timing entries, filtering zero transferSize/duration), and MetricsAggregator class (configurable cadence with setInterval, preset override, graceful degradation for missing sources, subscribe/unsubscribe push interface, idempotent start/stop lifecycle). Updated barrel exports in metrics and domain index files. Wired aggregator into main.ts with ProbeSampler, ResourceTimingCollector, and PresetState. Added ADR-009. Relaxed no-explicit-any lint rule for test files. All 218 unit tests and 36 E2E tests pass.
